parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ customer_id: $json.customer_id, customer_name: $json.customer_name, risk_score: $json.risk_score, risk_tier: $json.risk_tier, alert_message: $json.risk_tier === 'critical' ? 'URGENT: Your account shows critical stress signals. Immediate action required.' : 'Important: Your account shows elevated risk. Please review your finances.', city: $json.city, salary: $json.monthly_salary }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const tierIcon = { critical: '\uD83D\uDD34', watch: '\uD83D\uDFE1', stable: '\uD83D\uDFE2' }[d.risk_tier] || '\u26AA';
const mlLabel = d.ml_api_used ? 'Real ML API' : 'Heuristic Fallback';
const pipelineMs = Date.now() - (d.pipeline_ts || Date.now());

const summary = {
  event_id: 'EVT_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.floor(Math.random()*9999),
  event_time: new Date().toISOString(),
  pipeline_run_ms: pipelineMs,
  customer_id: d.customer_id,
  customer_name: d.customer_name,
  city: d.city,
  region: d.region,
  segment: d.segment,
  credit_score: d.credit_score,
  monthly_salary: d.monthly_salary,
  txn_id: d.txn_id,
  txn_type: d.txn_type,
  merchant_category: d.merchant_category,
  amount: d.amount,
  is_stress_signal: d.is_stress_signal,
  risk_score: d.risk_score,
  risk_tier: d.risk_tier,
  risk_tier_icon: tierIcon,
  xgboost_score: d.xgboost_score,
  lightgbm_score: d.lightgbm_score,
  tft_score: d.tft_score,
  ensemble_score: d.ensemble_score,
  calibrated_pd: d.calibrated_pd,
  tte_days: d.tte_days,
  uplift_score: d.uplift_score,
  confidence_flag: d.confidence_flag,
  meta_learner_used: d.meta_learner_used,
  top_shap_features: d.top_shap_features,
  product_actions: d.product_actions,
  ml_source: mlLabel,
  intervention_type: d.risk_tier === 'stable' ? 'none' : d.risk_tier === 'watch' ? 'preventive_outreach' : 'urgent_intervention',
  notify_status: d.notify_status,
  channels_sent: d.channels_sent,
  channels_count: d.channels_count,
  notify_results: d.notify_results || [],
  stages: [
    { stage: 'ingestion',    ts: d.ingested_at,  status: 'ok',                                  label: 'CBS Ingested' },
    { stage: 'auth',         ts: d.ingested_at,  status: 'ok',                                  label: 'JWT Auth Token Obtained' },
    { stage: 'ml_scoring',   ts: d.scored_at,    status: d.ml_api_used ? 'live' : 'fallback',   label: 'ML Scored (' + mlLabel + ')' },
    { stage: 'risk_routing', ts: d.scored_at,    status: 'ok',                                  label: 'Routed to ' + d.risk_tier.toUpperCase() },
    { stage: 'notification', ts: new Date().toISOString(), status: d.notify_status === 'no_action' ? 'skipped' : 'ok', label: d.notify_status === 'no_action' ? 'No Action (Stable)' : 'Notified via ' + d.channels_sent },
    { stage: 'complete',     ts: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'ok',                        label: 'Pipeline Complete (' + pipelineMs + 'ms)' }
  ]
};

console.log('[PIPELINE] ' + d.customer_name + ' | ' + tierIcon + ' ' + d.risk_tier.toUpperCase() + ' | score=' + d.risk_score.toFixed(3) + ' | ml=' + mlLabel + ' | run=' + pipelineMs + 'ms');
return [{ json: summary }];
